summary: Excellent audience recording captures a surprisingly stellar Ventura performance with standout China Doll and Jerry’s soaring guitar work.
review: The tape, recorded on a Sony D5 cassette with EC‑220 mics, is praised as pristine and atmospheric despite the windy, dusty conditions of the night. Listeners repeatedly note that the show morphs from a rough start into a memorable set – highlighted by an inspired China Doll and Jerry Garcia’s growling guitar solos. Overall the performance and the recording are regarded as a hidden gem of the early‑80s era.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (6 out of 7) give 4–5 stars and specifically praise both the musical performance and the high‑quality audience recording; only one low‑rating comment mentions wind challenges, so the combined show/recording assessment is strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pristine cassette capture with EC‑220 mics; reviewers call it superb and smooth despite wind, dust and intense sun. Atmospheric ambience is preserved, making the recording stand out among Ventura tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert starts a bit rough but quickly morphs into an engaging, “other‑world” performance; the band appears to have been especially inspired by playing in Ventura.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for his growling tone and soaring solos (e.g., "Jerry GROWL Run Run Run").
